blockers: Context budget exhausted at 78% before spawning expensive researcher/planner/checker subagents. Subagent spawns must happen in a fresh session to avoid mid-flight compaction.

decisions.decision: Detection method: WMI primary + Registry fallback (HKLM\SYSTEM\...\BitLockerStatus\BootStatus)
decisions.rationale: False-positive Encrypted is dangerous; false-negative is benign. WMI handles common case, Registry covers WMI-in-SYSTEM flakiness flagged in STATE.md. FVE API rejected as undocumented.

decisions.decision: Four-state encryption status: Encrypted / Suspended / Unencrypted / Unknown
decisions.rationale: Honors CRYPT-02 verbatim - admin sees Unknown and decides via allowlist instead of system silently labeling.

decisions.decision: Extend Phase 33 DiskIdentity with Option<EncryptionStatus>, Option<EncryptionMethod>, Option<DateTime<Utc>>
decisions.rationale: Follows Phase 33 is_boot_disk precedent. Option<> keeps schema additive; old serialized records stay readable.

decisions.decision: Re-verification: startup + 6-hour periodic poll, emit-on-change, configurable via agent-config.toml
decisions.rationale: Six hours balances post-install BitLocker disablement detection against SIEM noise. Event-log subscription parked to v0.7.1.
Recommended in STACK.md; dlp-common stays pure-data.
Aligns with dlp-common (already 0.61). Phase 34 is first phase needing Win32 Registry APIs in dlp-agent - clean trigger for the bump.

decisions.decision: WMI auth: AuthLevel::PktPrivacy, 5s per-volume timeout, parallel via tokio JoinSet
decisions.rationale: PktPrivacy required for MicrosoftVolumeEncryption namespace. Default 60s timeout flagged as too long for startup path. JoinSet ensures one hung volume doesn't stall the rest.

decisions.decision: Module location: dlp-agent/src/detection/encryption.rs; reuse EventType::DiskDiscovery audit variant
decisions.rationale: Sibling to disk.rs, mirrors Phase 33 module shape. Encryption fields ride on DiskIdentity so no new audit variants needed; SIEM filters on justification LIKE 'encryption status changed%'.
